chapter_title.en: What Can and Cannot Be Used for Prostration

text: 842 - وَ رُوِيَ عَنِ اَلصَّادِقِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «إِنَّمَا يُكْرَهُ ذَلِكَ خَشْيَةَ أَنْ يُؤْذَى مَنْ إِلَى جَانِبِهِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.842 - It was narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) that He said:
"It is disliked (makruh) because it may cause harm to the person next to him."
